p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { zmod_mk(x0, x1) = zmod_mk(x0, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, b)
not a.congr_mod(b, n) or zmod_mk(n, b) = zmod_mk(n, a)

b != a or a.congr_mod(b, n)
